content.en:
The physical body controls 362 times!

The flesh is in control 363 times!

......

At this time, Ye Tian frantically evolved and deduced, the copy body collapsed again and again, condensed again and again, and the degree of control of the physical body became higher and higher.

As long as the degree of physical body control reaches 365 times, he will impact the ninth transformation of the invincible domain body, thus directly stepping into the realm of the invincible domain body.

At that time, he would be able to impact the Peerless Domain Ancestor realm.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian completed the perfect extreme control of 365 times the control of the physical body.

With one thought, the invincible domain body transformed.

Bang!!!!!

The ninth invincible domain body transformation came, and countless energies poured into Ye Tian's body.

Densely packed, all the precious resources covering the Holy Monument World turned into energy lakes and poured into Ye Tian's body, helping him complete the transformation of the Invincible Domain Body.

Ten thousand years and ten thousand years have passed, and this transformation has been carried out for millions of years, I don't know how many resources Ye Tian has consumed, I am afraid it is enough to make hundreds of invincible domain bodies promote to peerless domain ancestors.

Finally, on this day, the Invincible Domain completely completed the ninth metamorphosis and evolved to the Invincible Domain.

Moreover, Ye Tian's holy soul and domain power began to usher in qualitative changes, and they skyrocketed wildly.

Millions of years passed, and Ye Tiancai finally completed the breakthrough.

Because it was a breakthrough in the time array, it didn't take long for the outside world to pass.

"Cultivation is a breakthrough, I am already a peerless domain ancestor, and now my strength is more than a hundred times stronger than in the past, if I fight with the black vein holy ancestor again, I am afraid that I can pinch him to death with one hand!" Ye Tian said confidently.

As for how strong his strength is, it's hard to say.

There is definitely no way to compare with the Ancestor, and it is not even comparable to the Half-Step Ancestor, but compared to the top Peerless Domain Ancestor, it can definitely fight one or two.

The Ancestor of the Superior Domain is divided into the early stage of the Ancestor of the Superior Domain, the middle stage of the Ancestor of the Superior Domain, the late stage of the Ancestor of the Superior Domain, and the peak of the Ancestor of the Superior Domain.

The Ancestor Realm was still relatively far away from Ye Tian, and his current goal was to raise his cultivation to the middle stage of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, that is, to refine the Peerless Domain Ancestor to the middle stage, this step was very difficult.

Because there are too few treasures in the Dark Forbidden Domain that can help the Peerless Domain Ancestor refine the Supreme Domain Body, almost all the Peerless Domain Ancestors need to slowly refine the Supreme Domain Body, and the cultivation speed is very slow and slow.

For example, the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor and the Jinchen Saint Ancestor have cultivated for an unknown number of realm eras, and they have only cultivated to the mid-stage realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, which shows that it is difficult for the Peerless Domain Ancestor to improve their cultivation.

Ye Tian had tried to cultivate for millions of years, and then he gave up cultivation for the time being, because there was almost no progress.

"It's hard for a higher-level domain to progress, but an ancestral body can make progress!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

There is no shortcut to the non-superior domain, you can only refine it step by step, unless you look for a treasure that can refine the non-superior domain, but it is difficult to obtain such a treasure.

And the ancestral body is different, the ancestral body is somewhat similar to the ancestral technique, which can be deduced and evolved, and if you understand the mystery of the ancestral body, you can make rapid progress.

It's like if he understood the mystery of the promotion of the Holy Body to the Ancestral Body, and easily broke the Holy Body.

Now, Ye Tian's ancestral body is the entry realm, and if it is derived and deduced again and again, it is enough to deduce the ancestral body to the Xiaocheng realm.

In terms of ancestral skills, Ye Tian couldn't improve, because his ancestral skills were almost complete.

"At present, it seems that the most promising thing to improve is the ancestral body, and when I deduce the eternal immortal ancestral body to the Xiaocheng realm, my strength will be greatly improved!"

Ye Tian said in a low voice.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to use the evolution of the copied body to deduce the eternal immortal ancestral body.

After breaking through to a Peerless Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian's Holy Soul was many times stronger than in the past, so the effect of derivation was naturally better.

Evolving again and again, Ye Tian's perception of the Eternal Immortal Ancestor became deeper and deeper.

Ten million years!

100 million years!

A billion years!

Tens of billions of years!

After three billion years of penance, Ye Tian went through countless evolutions, and finally deduced the ancestral body to the realm of Xiaocheng.

this day.

Ye Tian began to cultivate according to the results of the derivation, and the ancestral body quickly broke through.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian's physical body began to change qualitatively, and the higher the ancestral body realm, the stronger his physical body naturally became.

"Hahaha, it's several times stronger!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, if you want to deduce the ancestral body to the Dacheng realm, it will be extremely difficult.

After the breakthrough, Ye Tian was in a good mood and went out.

After 30 billion years, the situation in the Daoshan Realm has changed greatly.

Now, the Terrans have completely occupied the Daoshan Realm, as for the original forces, even if Ye Tian did not clean up these forces, but with the increasing number of Terrans, any small Terran forces can sweep everything, and those forces outside the Terrans have no room for survival at all.

Some of the forces that gave birth to the Supreme Domain Ancestors left the Daoshan Realm in desperation, some went to the Dark Sacred Domain, some went to other realms, and only a few were attached to the human forces and occupied a small piece of territory to survive.

The only force that has a good life is Black Wind Mountain.

Black Wind Mountain has obtained a huge area given by the Terrans, plus some Terran warriors have also joined the Black Wind Mountain, so the Black Wind Mountain has barely become a half-human power, and life is good, the original three mountain masters of the Black Wind Mountain have also become the strongest domain ancestors, Ye Tian's former master Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, now he has also become the Void Heaven Domain Ancestor, and he has become an invincible domain ancestor with a grain of star soul sand given by Ye Tian, which is very powerful in a small place like the Dao Mountain Realm.

For example, Ye Tian's former friend Ouyang Jiu'er has now become an invincible domain ancestor, and naturally she has also received Ye Tian's favor, otherwise where would she have the potential to enter the realm of invincible domain ancestors!

In short, those acquaintances of Ye Tian who used to be are doing well now.

"Recently, the strength has been improving too slowly, you should go to the edge of the Dark Forbidden Realm and fight with the Silent Annihilation Clan, maybe there will be a bigger gain!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, his body will not go, only send a copy body, and even if he dies in battle, he will not feel distressed.
